description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance Lamborghini sports car finished in a striking light blue color. The car features an aggressive aerodynamic design with sharp lines, a low-slung body, and prominent air intakes along the sides. The front end is characterized by angular headlights and a sculpted hood, while the rear showcases a large black engine cover and integrated rear diffuser. The vehicle sits on stylish five-spoke alloy wheels and has a glass canopy that reveals a luxurious, two-seat interior. The side mirrors are streamlined, and the overall stance of the car emphasizes speed and agility. The car's exterior is primarily composed of painted metal and glass, with visible rubber tires and some plastic trim elements.
description: A light blue Lamborghini sports car with sharp aerodynamic lines, black engine cover, and five-spoke alloy wheels. Its low, aggressive stance and luxury details highlight its high-performance design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the car's low profile, sharp side intakes, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black engine cover, rear diffuser, and taillight contours.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the low profile and aerodynamic features, with clear visibility of the wheels and side intakes.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the angular headlights, sculpted hood, and aggressive front fascia.
